name: Chocolate Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine the cream cheese and sugar; beat well.
3. Blend in the cocoa, scraping the sides of the bowl and beaters frequently.
4. Add the eggs and vanilla; blend well.
5. Mix in the whipping cream.
6. Pour into the crust.
7. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes (the center will be soft but will set upon cooling).
8. Cool to room temperature.
9. Cover and chill several hours or overnight.
10. Garnish with cherry pie filling.
11. Serve 6 to 8.
